title: KNIPEX 03 06 200 Combination Pliers chrome plated insulated with multi-component grips, VDE-tested 200 mm, 1 - Pack
features: With gripping zones for flat and round material, suitable for versatile use
With cutting edges for soft and hard wire
Long cutting edges for thicker cables
Cutting edges additionally induction-hardened, cutting edge hardness approx. 60 HRC
description: From the manufacturer Particularly powerful combination pliers for electrical workshops and industry With gripping functions for flat and round parts and strong cutting edges In the long 200 mm version, these combination pliers from Knipex are particularly strong. The serrated gripping jaws hold flat workpieces firmly, preventing twisting. They feature a serrated, oval burner port for round and half-round objects. These holding options make several functions possible: e.g. counter-holding small and medium-sized hexagonal nuts, pulling and holding sheet metal and angled steel, holding and turning pipes and conduits, bending locking pins and tensioning Bowden cables. These combination pliers are also versatile and powerful when cutting. They cut multi-strand copper cables up to Ø 13.0 mm, medium-hard wire up to Ø 3.8 mm and even hard wire (wire rope strand) up to Ø 2.5 mm. Thanks to the long cutting edges, both wires and thick cables (up to 16 mm²) can be easily inserted into and cut with the pliers. The interaction between the hardness of the cutting edges (approx. 60 HRC), sharpness and long lever arm ensures that the effort expended by the user is low. Forged from special tool steel, oil hardened and chrome plated The large and strong Knipex 03 06 200 VDE combination pliers offer excellent tool usefulness and durability. Forged from special tool steel, they receive an additional, multi-stage oil hardening. The final chrome plating protects against corrosion and makes cleaning easier. The VDE-tested combination pliers impress with many possible uses on construction sites and in the electrical industry. Large and strong, excellently machined VDE combination pliers Serrated jaws for flat parts, serrated burner port for round parts Long cutting edges for thick cables Cutting value for soft wire, e.g. multi-strand copper cable: up to Ø 13 mm Cutting value for medium-hard wire Ø 3.8 mm Cutting value for hard wire Ø 2.5 mm Handles with voltage-insulating multi-component grips, VDE-tested Net weight 326 g, length 2000 mm Combination pliers from Knipex: versatile, reliable and robust Combination pliers from Knipex offer a high degree of functionality when gripping, holding and cutting. Professional users rightly expect high precision and quality for comfortable and safe working from Knipex based on its decades of experience in toolmaking. The accuracy and long service life of these pliers are impressive. The reason for this lies in the materials and the care taken in their manufacture. The machining meets Knipex's high quality standards. We manufacture our pliers in Wuppertal from high-quality materials, machine them with a high degree of precision on modern machine tools and harden them by means of multiple careful heat treatments. All pliers from Knipex embody over 130 years of specialist expertise. Round cables can also be cut cleanly. Simply grip flat shapes securely. Simply grip flat shapes securely.
